# enqueue(_:)

**Instance Method**

Enqueues an element in the queue.

## Declaration

```swift
func enqueue(_ element: UnsafeRawPointer) throws
```

## Parameters

- **element**: The element to enqueue.

## Managing Queues

- **dequeue()**: Dequeues an element from the queue.
- **reset()**: Resets the queue.

items.description: Dequeues an element from the queue.
